name: First Peoples' Assembly of Victoria
summary: The First Peoples' Assembly of Victoria is an independent, democratically elected body representing Traditional Owners and First Peoples in Victoria in Treaty-related processes.

name: Australian Conservation Foundation
summary: The Australian Conservation Foundation is a national environmental advocacy organisation campaigning to protect nature and address climate pollution.

name: Limestone Coast Landscape Board
summary: The Limestone Coast Landscape Board is a South Australian statutory board that leads regional landscape and natural resource management.

name: Strait Climate Action
summary: Strait Climate Action is described as a Torres Strait youth climate group creating language-based resources and intergenerational climate campaigning.
notes: No standalone official website was discoverable; this URL is a third-party grant page that names and describes the group.

name: North Queensland Land Council
summary: The North Queensland Land Council is the recognised Native Title Representative Body supporting Traditional Owners across its North Queensland region.

name: Wardliparingga - SAHMRI
summary: Wardliparingga is SAHMRI’s Aboriginal Health Equity research theme focused on improving health and wellbeing outcomes for Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples.
notes: Wardliparingga appears to be a SAHMRI division rather than a separate legal entity, so the official SAHMRI program page is used.

name: Tribes United
summary: Spiritual Unity of the Tribes is an Australian intertribal community focused on ceremony, cultural continuity, and traditional knowledge sharing.
notes: Could not find a clearly matching standalone organisation explicitly named 'Tribes United'; this is the closest Australian match found.

name: Social Reinvestment WA
summary: Social Reinvestment WA is an Aboriginal-led coalition advocating justice reinvestment and reforms to reduce Aboriginal over-representation in WA’s justice system.

name: Human Rights Law Centre
summary: The Human Rights Law Centre is a legal advocacy organisation that works to advance and defend human rights through law reform, litigation, and public campaigning.

name: Queensland Teachers' Union
summary: The Queensland Teachers' Union is the industrial and professional union representing educators in Queensland state schools and TAFE.

name: Tasmanian Aboriginal Centre
summary: The Tasmanian Aboriginal Centre is an Aboriginal community organisation delivering statewide advocacy, health, cultural, language, and community programs.

name: ARDS Aboriginal Corporation
summary: ARDS Aboriginal Corporation is a Yolŋu-led organisation that supports language, culture, education, and community development in Northeast Arnhem Land.

name: The Nurse On Foot
summary: The Foot Care Nurse is a nurse-led mobile and clinic foot-care service providing in-home nail and foot health support in Victoria.
notes: No verifiable official web presence for the exact name 'The Nurse On Foot' was found; this is the closest Australian match.

name: Mob Made Media & Communications Agency
summary: Mob Made Media & Communications Agency appears to be a First Nations media and content production agency credited on arts and community campaign work.
notes: No standalone official website was discoverable; this Instagram profile handle is used based on repeated public tagging/credits.

name: First Australians Capital
summary: First Australians Capital is a First Nations-led impact investment and business support organisation backing Indigenous entrepreneurs and enterprises.

name: Invasive Species Council
summary: The Invasive Species Council is an Australian environmental advocacy organisation working to prevent and reduce harm from invasive species.

name: Pitta Pitta Aboriginal Corporation RNTBC
summary: Pitta Pitta Aboriginal Corporation RNTBC acts as trustee for the native title rights and interests of the Pitta Pitta People.
notes: No standalone corporate website was found; this is the official Native Title prescribed body corporate directory profile.

name: Aboriginal Housing Office
summary: The Aboriginal Housing Office is a NSW statutory body responsible for improving access to affordable housing for Aboriginal people.

name: Katji Yanun
summary: Katji Yanun appears to be an Aboriginal-led consulting practice focused on justice, governance, and systems reform advisory work.
notes: No dedicated website or company page was found; this is the principal consultant profile listing Katji Yanun.

name: Justice Reinvestment Port Augusta
summary: Justice Reinvestment Port Augusta appears to be a community-led Port Augusta initiative linked to Aboriginal-led justice reinvestment work delivered via Healthy Dreaming.
notes: No standalone official site for the initiative was found; this URL is the Port Augusta organisation publicly referenced in justice reinvestment program materials.
